budget_discontinuity.reason: corrupted node-plus-packet budget cannot satisfy GPR4

claim_promotion.reason: single-cycle correction cannot emit agency or semantic-goal claims

direct_rewrite.reason: proxy correction must be produced by scheduled packet work and step()

no_response_to_error.reason: missing packet work leaves proxy error unchanged

positive_response_reduces_error.reason: accepted response must reduce proxy error

processed_packet_missing.reason: GPR4 requires packet work processed by step()

wrong_direction_response.reason: increase-proxy packet would move an above-band proxy away from target
